sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The white character has overlapped with the green object. The white character is now on top of the green one. It seems like the goal might be to merge/overlap them. Let me check the current state - the white character seems to have partially covered the green. Let me check if this completed the level or what happens next.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
print("Score:", last_action_result.get('reward', 0))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
